occupation: Chief Executive Officer at Big Screen Video

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description: Big Screen Video is South Australia’s major LED screen supplier for hire and permanent installation. Operating as a national company from South Australian headquarters, we offer something unique to this industry. Big Screen Video is one of the few LED suppliers in the country with a fully functioning service department, with the capabilities to service, maintain, build and repair our product within the country. Big Screen Video specialise in providing not only a product but a trusted level of service. This service extends to turn-key solutions, meaning we can project manage the entire build of your screen, from design of structure right through to managing all contractors to the finished product. Visit our website for more information about Big Screen Video and some of the major projects we’ve undertaken across the country www.bigscreenvideo.com.au As CEO my role is: -          Building our presence nationwide -          Managing outdoor media -          Expanding the business
